scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npx vite build && cd ../backend && npm install && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const keys=['PORT','CLAUDE_API_KEY','BREVO_API_KEY','TITAN_SMTP_HOST','TITAN_SMTP_PORT','TITAN_AMIR_EMAIL','TITAN_AMIR_PASSWORD','TITAN_MARY_EMAIL','TITAN_MARY_PASSWORD'];const lines=keys.filter(k=>process.env[k]).map(k=>k+'='+process.env[k]);if(lines.length)fs.writeFileSync('.env',lines.join('\n'));console.log('Wrote',lines.length,'env vars to .env')"
